case_title: KARDUM, PETER E. et al vs. MARTINEZ, JOSE et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, INDIA ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS

C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONF. ALL PARTIES AND COUNSEL PRESENT EXCEPT DEFT. JOSE MEDINA WHOSE DEFAULT WAS ENTERED ON 10/2/96. ARNOLD EVJE II APPEARED FOR PLTF. PETER E KARDUM WHO WAS ON TELEPHONE STANDBY. CASE SETTLED BY JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION RECORDED BY JOHN LEWIS. PRO TEM FARLEY TOLPEN. D. CARTER, CLERK.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, JOSE MARTINEZ, INDIA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 929 ALABAMA STREET SAN FRANCISCO, CA., STAYED UNTIL NOV-12-1996, LEASE FORFEITED, IF DEFT VACATES TIMELY, NO MONEY JUDGMENT. HOWEVER IF NOT, AMENDED JUDGMENT FOR UNPAID BACK RENT OF $1,100.00, AND $23. 33 PER DAY FROM 9/1/96 THROUGH 11/12/96, ATTY FEES OF $700.0 0 AND COST $113.00 SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH.
